title: Shivtanium Client
description: Shivter's Minecraft Modpack with custom FancyMenu layouts, Quality of Life mods, and Optimization mods.
body:
![Shivtanium Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94feb98ae76a724bbf742af076753f13d5699e67.png)

# Shivtanium Client
Shivter's Clientside ModPack with FancyMenu layouts making it a client. (Currently in Beta)

This modpack is full of optimization mods, aswell as quality of life mods.
It contains ViaFabricPlus to be able to join servers that don't support the latest version.

It is made with large servers in mind (includes VeryManyPlayers, Tab Tweaks, Nametag Tweaks...) and also SMPs filled with data packs (Better Advancements, Better Statistics Screen)

Runs fine with just 1.5GB of RAM and a Dual-Core CPU Intel i7-7Y75 with Integrated Graphics
